cards.front: I would like to work here
cards.grammarNote: vouloir in the conditional: je voudrais. The conditional is formed from the future stem + imparfait endings (-ais, -ais, -ait, -ions, -iez, -aient). je voudrais is far more polite than je veux.

pouvoir in conditional: je pourrais, vous pourriez. Used in formal/polite requests. Pourriez-vous = Could you (formal/plural). The conditional of pouvoir is the most common way to make polite requests.
préférer → conditional: je préférerais. Stem-changing verbs often regularize in the future/conditional stem: préférer → préférer-. Endings: -ais, -ais, -ait, etc.

cards.front: I'd like to be a doctor
cards.grammarNote: After être, professions drop the article: être médecin (not 'un médecin'). je voudrais expresses a wish or aspiration.

cards.front: He would like to apply for this job
cards.back: Il aimerait postuler à ce poste
cards.grammarNote: aimer in conditional: il aimerait. aimerait = would like to (gentler than voudrait). postuler à = to apply for (a position).

cards.front: We would like to know more
cards.grammarNote: nous aimerions = we would like. en savoir plus = to know more about it. en here replaces de + the topic already implied.

cards.front: I would work there if I could
cards.grammarNote: si + imparfait, conditional = hypothetical. J'y travaillerais (conditional) si je pouvais (imparfait). The conditional is never used in the si clause itself.

cards.front: Could I have an application form?
cards.back: Est-ce que je pourrais avoir un formulaire ?
cards.grammarNote: je pourrais = I could / could I (conditional of pouvoir). A polite alternative to est-ce que je peux (can I).

cards.front: She would earn more in that job
cards.back: Elle gagnerait plus dans ce métier
cards.grammarNote: gagner → conditional: elle gagnerait. Regular -ER verbs form the conditional with infinitive + endings: gagnER + -ait → gagnerait.
avoir in conditional: j'aurais, vous auriez. Irregular conditional stem: aur-. Used for polite inquiries. du temps = some time (partitive).

cards.front: I would be happy to start next week
cards.back: Je serais ravi(e) de commencer la semaine prochaine
cards.grammarNote: être in conditional: je serais. Irregular conditional stem: ser-. ravi(e) de + infinitive = delighted to. Add -e for feminine.

cards.back: Ils préféreraient travailler à temps partiel
cards.grammarNote: à temps partiel = part-time. à temps plein = full-time. Regular conditional: ils préféreraient.
